'''jashupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ppl|ppl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ppl|ppl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jashupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæshipith|jæshipith]] || [[word:jæshipij|jæshipij]] || [[word:jæshipish|jæshipish]] || [[word:jæshipi|jæshipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jashushuputh|jashushuputh]] || [[word:jashushupuj|jashushupuj]] || [[word:jashushupush|jashushupush]] || [[word:jashushupu|jashushupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jashuputh|jashuputh]] || [[word:jashupuj|jashupuj]] || [[word:jashupush|jashupush]] || [[word:jashupu|jashupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jashufputh|jashufputh]] || [[word:jashufpuj|jashufpuj]] || [[word:jashufpush|jashufpush]] || [[word:jashufpuf|jashufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jashuputhu|jashuputhu]] || [[word:jashupuju|jashupuju]] || [[word:jashupushu|jashupushu]] || [[word:jashupuku|jashupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jashuputh|jashuputh]] || [[word:jashupuj|jashupuj]] || [[word:jashupush|jashupush]] || [[word:jashupu|jashupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jashuputhul|jashuputhul]] || [[word:jashupujul|jashupujul]] || [[word:jashupushul|jashupushul]] || [[word:jashupukul|jashupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jashuputhuthu|jashuputhuthu]] || [[word:jashupujuju|jashupujuju]] || [[word:jashupushushu|jashupushushu]] || [[word:jashupuku|jashupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jashuputhun|jashuputhun]] || [[word:jashupujun|jashupujun]] || [[word:jashupushun|jashupushun]] || [[word:jashupukun|jashupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jashuputhuoro|jashuputhuoro]] || [[word:jashupujuoro|jashupujuoro]] || [[word:jashupushuoro|jashupushuoro]] || [[word:jashupukuoro|jashupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
